summary: The batch of synthetic samples demonstrates a good coverage of intents, difficulties, ambiguities, and noise types, but lacks diversity in the style attribute, with only five out of six styles represented. Additionally, there are several near-duplicate phrasings and shallow paraphrases present.
recommendations: Encourage the generation of samples with informal style to enhance diversity.
Introduce more edge cases and rare scenarios to balance the common scenarios.
Vary the phrasing and structure of similar intents to reduce near-duplicates.
